outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump threatens to bomb Iran's bridges and power plants as April 6 deadline looms
outlets.summary: CNN covers Trump's escalating threats against Iranian civilian infrastructure, noting the April 6 Hormuz deadline is now 3 days away. Highlights WTI's 12.9% surge and Dated Brent hitting $141.36.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Hegseth fires Army chief amid Iran war — critics call it 'unprecedented'
outlets.summary: WaPo focuses on the wartime firing of Gen. Randy George, calling it nearly without precedent in modern US military history. Reports bipartisan criticism.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Rubio says US can see 'finish line' on Iran war — confirms diplomatic exchanges
outlets.summary: Fox frames Rubio's Hannity interview as evidence the US is winning. Highlights 'finish line' quote and potential for direct US-Iran meeting.

outlets.name: Breitbart
outlets.headline: Rubio: 'It's Not Today, It's Not Tomorrow But It Is Coming'
outlets.summary: Breitbart leads with Rubio's optimistic war assessment and signals of NATO reexamination post-war.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war: What is happening on Day 35 of US-Israel attacks?
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera/Gulf News cover Day 35 with Trump's bridge/power plant threats, GCC UN resolution, and IDF Lebanon advances.

outlets.name: Reuters/AFP
outlets.headline: GCC backs UN resolution authorizing force to reopen Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: International wires cover the GCC-backed UNSC resolution with expected Russian/Chinese veto. Vote scheduled for Friday.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: After US strikes major bridge in Iran, Trump suggests power plants to be hit next
outlets.summary: ToI liveblog covers B1 bridge aftermath, Trump's next-phase threats, and GCC Hormuz resolution.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Iran fires largest ballistic missile salvo in weeks on Passover
outlets.summary: JPost covers the April 2 evening salvo including cluster munitions on Petah Tikva and 11-year-old girl critically wounded.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Iran drafting protocol to monitor Hormuz transit — Oman partnership
outlets.summary: Press TV covers Iran's proposed Hormuz transit protocol with Oman, framing it as Iran asserting sovereign control over waterway.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Iran rejects American dream of sacrificing defense to let US seize oil fields
outlets.summary: Tehran Times covers Iran's rejection of US demands to dismantle military capability, calling it a scheme to control Iran's oil resources.
